name: Arjuna Vishada Yoga
summary: Arjuna experiences sorrow, emotional conflict, and moral confusion before the Kurukshetra war begins.

name: Sankhya Yoga
summary: Lord Krishna introduces the teachings of self-knowledge, duty, discipline, and spiritual wisdom.

name: Karma Yoga
summary: The path of selfless action, disciplined duty, and performing work without attachment to results.

name: Jnana Karma Sanyasa Yoga
summary: Krishna explains divine knowledge, spiritual wisdom, and the deeper meaning of action and renunciation.

name: Karma Sanyasa Yoga
summary: The relationship between renunciation, detached action, inner peace, and spiritual liberation.

name: Bala Kanda
summary: The early life of Shri Rama, his education, virtues, and the foundational events of the Ramayana.
